claim: Abstract selected-witness (pattern, cyclic order) pair passing every currently implemented necessary abstract filter in this repository at the natural order. NOT a counterexample to Erdos Problem #97: Euclidean realizability is a separate, unproved question, and the two-orbit circulant lemma draft already excludes its C6-symmetric (two concentric regular hexagon) realizations, so any realization must be asymmetric.
structure: circulant with parity: even centers use offsets {1, 2, 10, 11} (= +-{1,2}); odd centers use offsets {2, 5, 7, 10} (= +-{2,5})

verification_2026_07_10.environment: fresh container at commit ecf9ea3; python 3.11.15, z3 4.16.0, scipy 1.17.1

kalmanson_full_cone_natural_order.solver: scipy linprog (HiGHS); solver diagnostic only, no exact dual certificate stored

verification_2026_07_10.search_provenance: found by an in-session randomized/structured escape hunt over two-orbit-style parity patterns (agent terminated early by an account spend limit); order enumeration in that session reported 4 label-0-canonical orders passing caps/crossing/vertex-circle, all in the single dihedral class of the natural order
verification_2026_07_10.order_enumeration_status: session-reported, not independently replayed; treat as unverified until re-enumerated

relation_to_known_results.registered_dead_patterns: not among the retired fixed patterns (P18/P24 parity kills are at n=18/24; C9/C13/C16/C17/C19/C20/C25/C29 differ)
relation_to_known_results.two_orbit_circulant_lemma: the C6-symmetric realization (two concentric regular hexagons, half-step offset) is excluded by docs/two-orbit-circulant-obstruction.md; the abstract pattern is its symmetry-free shadow and remains live
relation_to_known_results.b12_filters: mutual-rhombus midpoint rank 0, no phi-2-cycles, no rectangle-trap 4-cycles at the natural order (session diagnostics)

next_steps: independent re-enumeration of all cyclic orders passing the abstract filters
exact dual-certificate search over stronger row families (Altman rows, value rows, order-resolved rows) at the natural order
numerical realizability probe with the dynamic-witness searcher restricted to this fixed pattern
if a near-miss appears: exactification per repo standards; if not: record the negative result
non_claims: not a counterexample to Erdos Problem #97
no change to the official/global falsifiable/open status
